task:
Open /home/user/Documents/icon_bg.png in GIMP — a 200x200 image with a solid white background and a red circle in the center.

Replace the white background with full transparency (the red circle must remain opaque) and export the result as an RGBA PNG to /home/user/Documents/icon_transparent.png. The output must remain 200x200 pixels with an alpha channel.

verification.description: Image has RGBA mode (alpha channel present)
